name: motis-gtfs-orchestrator
description: MVP orchestrator for GTFS profile switching and MOTIS routing

scripts.lint: bash -lc "find src test -type f -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check"
scripts.test:coverage: bash -lc 'rm -rf coverage && c8 --all --src src --reporter=lcovonly --reporter=text-summary --report-dir coverage node --test test/unit test/integration test/e2e'
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
